inputs.label: Position uncertainty (Δx)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of position measurement (nanometer scale typical).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of position measurement (nanometer scale typical).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konum ölçümünün standart sapması (tipik olarak nanometre ölçeği).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type de la mesure de position (échelle nanométrique typique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar de la medición de posición (escala típica en nanómetros).

inputs.label: Momentum uncertainty (Δp)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of momentum measurement. Adjust based on measurement system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of momentum measurement. Adjust based on measurement system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Momentum ölçümünün standart sapması. Ölçüm sistemine göre ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardabweichung der Impulsmessung. Anpassung basierend auf dem Messsystem.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type de la mesure de quantité de mouvement. Ajuster selon le système de mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar de la medición de momento. Ajustar según el sistema de medición.

inputs.label: Reduced Planck constant (ħ)
inputs.businessContext: Fundamental quantum constant. Typically fixed, but adjustable for theoretical scenarios.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fundamental quantum constant. Typically fixed, but adjustable for theoretical scenarios.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel kuantum sabiti. Genellikle sabittir, ancak teorik senaryolar için ayarlanabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fundamentale Quantenkonstante. Normalerweise fest, aber für theoretische Szenarien anpassbar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante quantique fondamentale. Généralement fixe, mais ajustable pour des scénarios théoriques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante cuántica fundamental. Normalmente fija, pero ajustable para escenarios teóricos.

inputs.label: Compliance tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor multiplier for minimum uncertainty product. >=1 ensures strict Heisenberg compliance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety factor multiplier for minimum uncertainty product. >=1 ensures strict Heisenberg compliance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Minimum belirsizlik çarpımı için güvenlik faktörü çarpanı. >=1, sıkı Heisenberg uyumluluğunu sağlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sicherheitsfaktor-Multiplikator für minimales Unsicherheitsprodukt. >=1 gewährleistet strenge Heisenberg-Konformität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité multiplicateur pour le produit d'incertitude minimal. >=1 garantit une conformité stricte à Heisenberg.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad multiplicador para el producto mínimo de incertidumbre. >=1 asegura el cumplimiento estricto de Heisenberg.

inputs.label: Particle mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the particle (e.g., electron) for velocity uncertainty derivation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the particle (e.g., electron) for velocity uncertainty derivation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hız belirsizliği türetimi için parçacığın (ör. elektron) kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Teilchens (z. B. Elektron) zur Ableitung der Geschwindigkeitsunsicherheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de la particule (ex. électron) pour la dérivation de l'incertitude de vitesse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de la partícula (p. ej., electrón) para la derivación de la incertidumbre de velocidad.

inputs.label: Velocity uncertainty (Δv)
inputs.businessContext: If 0, will be calculated as Δp/mass. Else used as direct input for alternative computations.

businessContext_i18n.en: If 0, will be calculated as Δp/mass. Else used as direct input for alternative computations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 ise Δp/kütle olarak hesaplanır. Aksi halde alternatif hesaplamalar için doğrudan girdi olarak kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn 0, wird als Δp/Masse berechnet. Sonst als direkte Eingabe für alternative Berechnungen verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si 0, sera calculée comme Δp/masse. Sinon, utilisée comme entrée directe pour des calculs alternatifs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es 0, se calculará como Δp/masa. De lo contrario, se usa como entrada directa para cálculos alternativos.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
